pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh verification scripts which validate the EXPORT_DIR target path.
Confirmed via export_result.sh verification scripts checking for the DICOMDIR file in the export directory.
Confirmed via export_result.sh verification scripts checking the dialog screenshot path.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires exporting a loaded DICOM study to the local directory /home/ga/DICOM/exports/patient_cd and ensuring a DICOMDIR index file is generated in that path. The agent must also capture and save a screenshot of the export dialog to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/export_dialog.png prior to execution. The DICOM data is synthetically generated with the patient ID CDTEST001.
